seoTitle: Ward vs Warenda — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ward and Warenda. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ward and Warenda.
heading: Ward vs Warenda — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ward, Queensland and Warenda, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Warenda has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Ward (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ward or Warenda safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ward has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Warenda scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ward scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Warenda scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ward or Warenda?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Warenda has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
